alkylation reagent: alkylated by the addition of 100 μL of 50 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: sequencing grade-modified trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
fractionation method: SDS/PAGE analysis was performed with NuPAGE 5–12% gel
instrument: analyzed via electrospray tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS) on a Thermo Q-Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: analyzed via electrospray tandem mass spectrometry
reduction reagent: 10 μL of 200 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl) phosphine HCl
reduction concentration: 10 μL of 200 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl) phosphine HCl
